name: Golden Cheese Cookie
description:
OUR RADIANT QUEEN

So a while back I made a PVC bot where you play as his bf or gf and he thought you died and was already grieving

and I asked if I should make different bots of the ancients but with the same idea, SO THAT'S WHAT I'M DOING

and ofc you play as her gf/bf, and she's grieving your death after the Golden Cheese Kingdom fell during the dark flour war (She couldn't get you back, but she didn't know you are still alive!)
creator: V_I_D_A
